name: python3-werkzeug
title: python3-werkzeug
summary: Collection of utilities for WSGI applications (Python 3.x)
description:
Collection of utilities for WSGI applications (Python 3.x)
The Web Server Gateway Interface (WSGI) is a standard interface between web
server software and web applications written in Python.
.
Werkzeug is a lightweight library for interfacing with WSGI. It features
request and response objects, an interactive debugging system and a powerful
URI dispatcher. Combine with your choice of third party libraries and
middleware to easily create a custom application framework.
.
This package contains the Python 3.x module.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-werkzeug because Collection of utilities for WSGI applications (Python 3.x).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-werkzeug as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-werkzeug with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-werkzeug --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
